list.name: sport_type
list.label: Sport Type
list.query: All : all, Outdoor : cycling_outdoor, Zwift : zwift, E-Bike : ebike, Indoor : cycling_indoor

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((COALESCE(SUM(distance_m), 0) / 1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Distance" FROM activities WHERE (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}');
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(elevation_m), 0)::numeric, 0) AS "Elevation" FROM activities WHERE (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}');
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Rides" FROM activities WHERE (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}');
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(duration_s), 0) AS "Hours" FROM activities WHERE (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}');

panels.title: Current FTP
panels.description:
Functional Threshold Power

The power you can sustain for ~1 hour.

Estimated as 95% of your best 20-minute average power from the last 90 days.

Override with VELOMATE_FTP env var.

panels.title: Peak CTL

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(MAX(ctl)::numeric, 1) AS "Peak CTL" FROM athlete_stats;

panels.description:
Peak Chronic Training Load

The highest fitness level (CTL) you've reached.

CTL is a 42-day exponential moving average of daily TSS.

panels.title: Avg Speed

targets.rawSql:
SELECT date::date AS time,
  ROUND(avg_speed_kmh::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Speed",
  ROUND(AVG(avg_speed_kmh) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)::numeric, 1) AS "10-ride avg"
FROM activities
WHERE avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
  AND $__timeFilter(date)
ORDER BY date;

panels.description:
Outdoor rides only, >5km (excludes short trips).

Dots = individual rides. Line = 10-ride rolling average.

panels.title: Avg Power

targets.rawSql:
SELECT date::date AS time,
  ROUND(avg_power::numeric, 0) AS "Avg Power",
  ROUND(AVG(avg_power) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)::numeric, 0) AS "10-ride avg"
FROM activities
WHERE avg_power IS NOT NULL AND avg_power > 0 AND duration_s > 1200
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
  AND $__timeFilter(date)
ORDER BY date;

panels.description:
Average power per ride (rides >20min with power data).

Dots = individual rides. Line = 10-ride rolling average.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT date::date AS time,
  avg_hr AS "Avg HR",
  ROUND(AVG(avg_hr) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)::numeric, 0) AS "10-ride avg"
FROM activities
WHERE avg_hr IS NOT NULL AND avg_hr > 0
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
  AND $__timeFilter(date)
ORDER BY date;

SELECT date::date AS time,
  ROUND((distance_m / 1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Distance",
  ROUND(AVG(distance_m / 1000.0) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)::numeric, 1) AS "10-ride avg"
FROM activities
WHERE distance_m > 0
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
  AND $__timeFilter(date)
ORDER BY date;

panels.title: Normalized Power

targets.rawSql:
WITH rolling AS (
  SELECT s.activity_id,
    AVG(s.power) OVER (
      PARTITION BY s.activity_id
      ORDER BY s.time_offset
      RANGE BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS rolling_30s
  FROM activity_streams s
  JOIN activities a ON a.id = s.activity_id
  WHERE s.power IS NOT NULL AND s.power > 0
    AND $__timeFilter(a.date)
    AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR a.sport_type = '${sport_type}')
),
np_per_ride AS (
  SELECT activity_id,
    POWER(AVG(POWER(rolling_30s, 4)), 0.25) AS np
  FROM rolling WHERE rolling_30s IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY activity_id
)
SELECT a.date::date AS time,
  ROUND(n.np::numeric, 0) AS "NP",
  ROUND(AVG(n.np) OVER (ORDER BY a.date ROWS BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)::numeric, 0) AS "10-ride avg"
FROM np_per_ride n
JOIN activities a ON a.id = n.activity_id
ORDER BY a.date;

panels.description:
Normalized Power accounts for variability in effort.

A steady 200W ride and an interval ride averaging 200W have different NP.

Higher NP = more intense effort pattern.

panels.title: Efficiency Factor

targets.rawSql:
WITH rolling AS (
  SELECT s.activity_id,
    AVG(s.power) OVER (
      PARTITION BY s.activity_id
      ORDER BY s.time_offset
      RANGE BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS rolling_30s
  FROM activity_streams s
  JOIN activities a ON a.id = s.activity_id
  WHERE s.power IS NOT NULL AND s.power > 0
    AND $__timeFilter(a.date)
    AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR a.sport_type = '${sport_type}')
),
np_per_ride AS (
  SELECT activity_id,
    POWER(AVG(POWER(rolling_30s, 4)), 0.25) AS np
  FROM rolling WHERE rolling_30s IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY activity_id
)
SELECT a.date::date AS time,
  ROUND((n.np / a.avg_hr)::numeric, 2) AS "EF",
  ROUND(AVG(n.np / a.avg_hr) OVER (ORDER BY a.date ROWS BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)::numeric, 2) AS "10-ride avg"
FROM np_per_ride n
JOIN activities a ON a.id = n.activity_id
WHERE a.avg_hr > 0
ORDER BY a.date;

panels.description:
Efficiency Factor = Normalized Power / Avg HR.

Rising EF = getting fitter (more power per heartbeat).

One of the best indicators of aerobic fitness improvement.

panels.title: Weekly Power Range

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  week AS time,
  COALESCE(prev_avg, avg_p) AS "open",
  max_p AS "high",
  min_p AS "low",
  avg_p AS "close"
FROM (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('week', date) AS week,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_power)::numeric, 0) AS avg_p,
    MAX(avg_power) AS max_p,
    MIN(avg_power) AS min_p,
    LAG(ROUND(AVG(avg_power)::numeric, 0)) OVER (ORDER BY date_trunc('week', date)) AS prev_avg
  FROM activities
  WHERE avg_power IS NOT NULL AND avg_power > 0
    AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
    AND $__timeFilter(date)
  GROUP BY 1
) sub
ORDER BY 1;

panels.description:
Min/avg/max power per week.

Green = avg power rising week-over-week.
Red = avg power falling.

panels.title: FTP Progression

targets.rawSql:
SELECT date_trunc('month', a.date) AS time,
  ROUND((MAX(sub.best_20min) * 0.95)::numeric, 0) AS "Est. FTP (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT activity_id, MAX(rolling_avg) AS best_20min
  FROM (
    SELECT s.activity_id,
      AVG(s.power) OVER (
        PARTITION BY s.activity_id
        ORDER BY s.time_offset
        RANGE BETWEEN 1199 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
      ) AS rolling_avg
    FROM activity_streams s
    WHERE s.power IS NOT NULL AND s.power > 0
  ) t
  GROUP BY activity_id
) sub
JOIN activities a ON a.id = sub.activity_id
WHERE sub.best_20min IS NOT NULL
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR a.sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

panels.description:
Monthly estimated FTP (best 20-min power × 0.95).

Dashed line = configured FTP override (VELOMATE_FTP).

panels.title: Best Efforts

targets.rawSql:
WITH rolling AS (
  SELECT s.activity_id,
    AVG(s.power) OVER (
      PARTITION BY s.activity_id
      ORDER BY s.time_offset
      RANGE BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS avg_1min
  FROM activity_streams s
  JOIN activities a ON a.id = s.activity_id
  WHERE s.power IS NOT NULL AND s.power > 0
    AND $__timeFilter(a.date)
    AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR a.sport_type = '${sport_type}')
)
SELECT a.date::date AS time,
  ROUND(MAX(r.avg_1min)::numeric, 0) AS "1-min"
FROM rolling r
JOIN activities a ON a.id = r.activity_id
GROUP BY a.date, a.id
ORDER BY a.date;

WITH rolling AS (
  SELECT s.activity_id,
    AVG(s.power) OVER (
      PARTITION BY s.activity_id
      ORDER BY s.time_offset
      RANGE BETWEEN 299 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS avg_5min
  FROM activity_streams s
  JOIN activities a ON a.id = s.activity_id
  WHERE s.power IS NOT NULL AND s.power > 0
    AND $__timeFilter(a.date)
    AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR a.sport_type = '${sport_type}')
)
SELECT a.date::date AS time,
  ROUND(MAX(r.avg_5min)::numeric, 0) AS "5-min"
FROM rolling r
JOIN activities a ON a.id = r.activity_id
GROUP BY a.date, a.id
ORDER BY a.date;

WITH rolling AS (
  SELECT s.activity_id,
    AVG(s.power) OVER (
      PARTITION BY s.activity_id
      ORDER BY s.time_offset
      RANGE BETWEEN 1199 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS avg_20min
  FROM activity_streams s
  JOIN activities a ON a.id = s.activity_id
  WHERE s.power IS NOT NULL AND s.power > 0
    AND $__timeFilter(a.date)
    AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR a.sport_type = '${sport_type}')
)
SELECT a.date::date AS time,
  ROUND(MAX(r.avg_20min)::numeric, 0) AS "20-min"
FROM rolling r
JOIN activities a ON a.id = r.activity_id
GROUP BY a.date, a.id
ORDER BY a.date;

panels.description:
Peak power at 1-min, 5-min, and 20-min durations per ride.

1-min = neuromuscular power.
5-min = VO2max capacity.
20-min = threshold power.

panels.title: Monthly Power Zone Distribution

targets.rawSql:
WITH zones AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('month', a.date) AS month,
    CASE
      WHEN s.power < ftp.val * 0.55 THEN 'Z1 Recovery'
      WHEN s.power < ftp.val * 0.75 THEN 'Z2 Endurance'
      WHEN s.power < ftp.val * 0.90 THEN 'Z3 Tempo'
      WHEN s.power < ftp.val * 1.05 THEN 'Z4 Threshold'
      WHEN s.power < ftp.val * 1.20 THEN 'Z5 VO2max'
      ELSE 'Z6 Anaerobic'
    END AS zone
  FROM activity_streams s
  JOIN activities a ON a.id = s.activity_id
  CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT COALESCE(
      NULLIF((SELECT value::numeric FROM sync_state WHERE key = 'configured_ftp'), 0),
      (SELECT ROUND(MAX(avg_20min) * 0.95) FROM (
        SELECT AVG(s2.power) OVER (PARTITION BY s2.activity_id ORDER BY s2.time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 1199 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_20min
        FROM activity_streams s2
        WHERE s2.power IS NOT NULL AND s2.power > 0
      ) sub2 WHERE avg_20min IS NOT NULL),
      (SELECT percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY avg_power) FROM activities WHERE avg_power IS NOT NULL AND avg_power > 0),
      150
    ) AS val
  ) ftp
  WHERE s.power IS NOT NULL AND s.power > 0
    AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR a.sport_type = '${sport_type}')
)
SELECT month AS time,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN zone = 'Z1 Recovery' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS "Z1 Recovery",
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN zone = 'Z2 Endurance' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS "Z2 Endurance",
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN zone = 'Z3 Tempo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS "Z3 Tempo",
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN zone = 'Z4 Threshold' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS "Z4 Threshold",
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN zone = 'Z5 VO2max' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS "Z5 VO2max",
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN zone = 'Z6 Anaerobic' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS "Z6 Anaerobic"
FROM zones
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description:
Monthly time spent in each Coggan power zone.

Polarized training = more time in Z1-2 and Z5-6, less in Z3-4.

Based on configured FTP or auto-estimated FTP.

panels.title: Monthly HR Zone Distribution

targets.rawSql:
WITH zones AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('month', a.date) AS month,
    CASE
      WHEN s.hr < mhr.val * 0.60 THEN 'Z1 Recovery'
      WHEN s.hr < mhr.val * 0.70 THEN 'Z2 Endurance'
      WHEN s.hr < mhr.val * 0.80 THEN 'Z3 Tempo'
      WHEN s.hr < mhr.val * 0.90 THEN 'Z4 Threshold'
      ELSE 'Z5 VO2max'
    END AS zone
  FROM activity_streams s
  JOIN activities a ON a.id = s.activity_id
  CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT COALESCE(
      NULLIF((SELECT value::numeric FROM sync_state WHERE key = 'configured_max_hr'), 0),
      (SELECT percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY max_hr) FROM activities WHERE max_hr IS NOT NULL AND max_hr > 0),
      185
    ) AS val
  ) mhr
  WHERE s.hr IS NOT NULL AND s.hr > 0
    AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR a.sport_type = '${sport_type}')
)
SELECT month AS time,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN zone = 'Z1 Recovery' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS "Z1 Recovery",
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN zone = 'Z2 Endurance' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS "Z2 Endurance",
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN zone = 'Z3 Tempo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS "Z3 Tempo",
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN zone = 'Z4 Threshold' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS "Z4 Threshold",
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN zone = 'Z5 VO2max' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS "Z5 VO2max"
FROM zones
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description:
Monthly time spent in each heart rate zone.

Z1-2 = easy/endurance. Z3-4 = tempo/threshold. Z5 = VO2max.

Based on configured max HR or auto-estimated.

panels.title: CTL / ATL / TSB

targets.rawSql:
SELECT date AS time,
  ctl AS "Fitness (CTL)",
  atl AS "Fatigue (ATL)",
  tsb AS "Form (TSB)"
FROM athlete_stats
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
ORDER BY date;

panels.description:
Fitness Curves

🔵 CTL (Chronic Training Load) — 42-day rolling fitness.
🟠 ATL (Acute Training Load) — 7-day rolling fatigue.
🟢 TSB (Form) — CTL minus ATL.

CTL rising = getting fitter. TSB negative = fatigued.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT date::date AS time,
  ROUND((SUM(distance_m) OVER (ORDER BY date, id) / 1000.0)::numeric, 0) AS "Total"
FROM activities
WHERE distance_m > 0
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
ORDER BY date, id;

SELECT date::date AS time,
  ROUND((SUM(elevation_m) OVER (ORDER BY date, id))::numeric, 0) AS "Total"
FROM activities
WHERE elevation_m > 0
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
ORDER BY date, id;

SELECT date::date AS time,
  ROUND((SUM(duration_s) OVER (ORDER BY date, id) / 3600.0)::numeric, 0) AS "Total"
FROM activities
WHERE duration_s > 0
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
ORDER BY date, id;

SELECT date::date AS time,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY date, id) AS "Total"
FROM activities
WHERE (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
ORDER BY date, id;

SELECT date::date AS time,
  ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(tss, 0)) OVER (ORDER BY date, id))::numeric, 0) AS "Total"
FROM activities
WHERE (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
ORDER BY date, id;

SELECT date::date AS time,
  ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(calories, 0)) OVER (ORDER BY date, id))::numeric, 0) AS "Total"
FROM activities
WHERE (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
ORDER BY date, id;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  ROUND((SUM(distance_m)/1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Outdoor"
FROM activities
WHERE sport_type = 'cycling_outdoor'
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  ROUND((SUM(distance_m)/1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Zwift"
FROM activities
WHERE sport_type = 'zwift'
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  ROUND((SUM(distance_m)/1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "E-Bike"
FROM activities
WHERE sport_type = 'ebike'
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  ROUND((SUM(distance_m)/1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Indoor"
FROM activities
WHERE sport_type = 'cycling_indoor'
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  ROUND(SUM(elevation_m)::numeric, 1) AS "Outdoor"
FROM activities
WHERE sport_type = 'cycling_outdoor'
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  ROUND(SUM(elevation_m)::numeric, 1) AS "Zwift"
FROM activities
WHERE sport_type = 'zwift'
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  ROUND(SUM(elevation_m)::numeric, 1) AS "E-Bike"
FROM activities
WHERE sport_type = 'ebike'
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  ROUND(SUM(elevation_m)::numeric, 1) AS "Indoor"
FROM activities
WHERE sport_type = 'cycling_indoor'
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS "Outdoor"
FROM activities
WHERE sport_type = 'cycling_outdoor'
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS "Zwift"
FROM activities
WHERE sport_type = 'zwift'
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS "E-Bike"
FROM activities
WHERE sport_type = 'ebike'
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS "Indoor"
FROM activities
WHERE sport_type = 'cycling_indoor'
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  ROUND((SUM(duration_s) / 3600.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Outdoor"
FROM activities
WHERE sport_type = 'cycling_outdoor'
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  ROUND((SUM(duration_s) / 3600.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Zwift"
FROM activities
WHERE sport_type = 'zwift'
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  ROUND((SUM(duration_s) / 3600.0)::numeric, 1) AS "E-Bike"
FROM activities
WHERE sport_type = 'ebike'
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  ROUND((SUM(duration_s) / 3600.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Indoor"
FROM activities
WHERE sport_type = 'cycling_indoor'
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) AS time,
  ROUND((SUM(distance_m)/1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "This Year (km)"
FROM activities
WHERE distance_m > 0
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('month', date) + interval '1 year' AS time,
  ROUND((SUM(distance_m)/1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Last Year (km)"
FROM activities
WHERE distance_m > 0
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date)::int AS "Year",
  COUNT(*) AS "Rides",
  ROUND((SUM(distance_m)/1000)::numeric, 0) AS "Distance (km)",
  ROUND(SUM(elevation_m)::numeric, 1) AS "Elevation (m)",
  ROUND((SUM(duration_s)/3600.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Hours",
  ROUND((AVG(distance_m)/1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Ride (km)",
  ROUND(((SUM(distance_m) / 1000.0) / NULLIF(SUM(duration_s / 3600.0), 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Speed",
  ROUND(SUM(tss)::numeric, 0) AS "Total TSS"
FROM activities
WHERE date IS NOT NULL
  AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 DESC;

SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT 'Longest Ride' AS "Record",
    ROUND((distance_m/1000)::numeric, 1) || ' km' AS "Value",
    TO_CHAR(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Date",
    id AS "_id", name AS "Ride"
  FROM activities WHERE distance_m IS NOT NULL
    AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
  ORDER BY distance_m DESC LIMIT 1
) a
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT 'Most Elevation',
    ROUND(elevation_m::numeric, 0) || ' m',
    TO_CHAR(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
    id, name
  FROM activities WHERE elevation_m IS NOT NULL
    AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
  ORDER BY elevation_m DESC LIMIT 1
) b
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT 'Fastest Avg Speed',
    ROUND(avg_speed_kmh::numeric, 1) || ' km/h',
    TO_CHAR(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
    id, name
  FROM activities WHERE avg_speed_kmh IS NOT NULL AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE AND distance_m > 5000
    AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
  ORDER BY avg_speed_kmh DESC LIMIT 1
) c
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT 'Highest Avg Power',
    ROUND(avg_power::numeric, 0) || ' W',
    TO_CHAR(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
    id, name
  FROM activities WHERE avg_power IS NOT NULL AND avg_power > 0
    AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
  ORDER BY avg_power DESC LIMIT 1
) d
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT 'Longest Duration',
    ROUND(duration_s / 3600.0::numeric, 1) || ' h',
    TO_CHAR(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
    id, name
  FROM activities WHERE duration_s IS NOT NULL
    AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
  ORDER BY duration_s DESC LIMIT 1
) e
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT 'Highest TSS',
    ROUND(tss::numeric, 0) || '',
    TO_CHAR(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
    id, name
  FROM activities WHERE tss IS NOT NULL
    AND (('${sport_type}' = 'all') OR sport_type = '${sport_type}')
  ORDER BY tss DESC LIMIT 1
) f;

panels.title: All-Time Rides Map

targets.rawSql:
SELECT s.lat AS "latitude", s.lng AS "longitude", a.date AS time
FROM activity_streams s
JOIN activities a ON a.id = s.activity_id
WHERE s.lat IS NOT NULL AND s.lng IS NOT NULL
  AND a.is_indoor IS NOT TRUE
  AND s.time_offset % 10 = 0
ORDER BY a.date, s.time_offset
LIMIT 500000;

panels.description:
All outdoor rides plotted on a map.

Shows every 10th GPS point to keep the query fast.

Denser areas = more frequently ridden roads.
